allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=[json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]; [print\(m.get\(''role'',''''\),'':'',str\(m.get\(''content'',''''\)\)[:500]\) for m in lines[-10:] if isinstance\(m.get\(''content''\), str\)]")
